quizQuestion:
このコンピューター１年前に買ったばかり{___}、もうすっかり時代遅れだわ。
(Even though  I bought this computer one year ago, it's already old fashioned.)
pedagogicalNote: のに(contrast 1493) = but/although (emotional/surprising); のに(purpose 551) = in order to; のに(wish 1593) = I wish; 反面 = on the other hand; にしては = for/considering; としても = even if/assuming; は(660) = contrastive topic marker
